mission.title: clickhouse: Full MPP-style execution mode and a CBO optimizer.
mission.description: Full MPP-style execution mode and a CBO optimizer.. Requested by 20+ users.

steps.title: Check current clickhouse setup
steps.description:
Verify your clickhouse version and configuration:
```bash
clickhouse-client --version
```
This feature requires a working clickhouse installation.

steps.title: Review clickhouse configuration
steps.description:
Review the relevant clickhouse configuration:
Hi, I and my friend   have developed a new infrastructure that provides a full MPP-style execution mode and a CBO optimizer. It is currently running in our test envirinment. Currently, we are intentionally aiming to push features to the community.

steps.title: Apply the fix for Full MPP-style execution mode and a CBO optimizer.
steps.description:
### Changelog category (leave one):
- New Feature

### Changelog entry (a user-readable short description of the changes that goes to CHANGELOG.md):
This is close [56826](https://github.com/ClickHouse/ClickHouse/issues/56826).

### Documentation entry for user-facing changes

> Information about CI checks: https://clickhouse.com/docs/en/development/continuous-integration/

See the source issue for community-verified solutions.

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected.
Confirm the feature described in "Full MPP-style execution mode and a CBO optimizer." is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary: This issue proposed adding full MPP-style execution mode and a CBO (Cost-Based Optimizer) to ClickHouse. The implementation PR #56827 was closed without being merged, and the issue was labeled as a duplicate by maintainers. The proposed features overlap with ClickHouse existing parallel execution infrastructure and ongoing query optimizer improvements.

prerequisites.description: A working clickhouse installation or development environment.
